debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
h : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
⊢ ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ ∀ (H : Graph α β), H.IsCompOf G → ∃! x, x ∈ H.vertexSet ∧ x ∉ V(G, M)

failed_attempts:
have h_comp (H : Graph α β) (hH : H.IsCompOf G) :
      ∃ M, H.IsMatching M ∧ ∃! x, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(H, M) := by
    -- The existence of such a matching follows from parts (a) and (b) and (c)(i).
    -- By (c)(i), adjacent vertices are series pairs in the matching matroid.
    -- Since H is connected, all vertices in H are in the same series class.
    -- By (a) (Matroid.fooA), this implies |V(H)| = 2*ν(H) + 1.
    -- Thus, a maximum matching in H leaves exactly one vertex uncovered.
    sorry
  choose f hf using h_comp
  use ⋃ (H : {H // H.IsCompOf G}), f H H.2
  refine ⟨?_, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  · rw [isMatching_iff]; constructor
    · simp only [Set.iUnion_subset_iff]; intro H hH; exact (hf H hH).1.subset.trans hH.subset_edgeSet
    · intro e g he hg hne
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Subtype.exists, exists_prop] at he hg
      obtain ⟨H, hH, he⟩ := he; obtain ⟨K, hK, hg⟩ := hg
      by_cases hHK : H = K
      · subst hHK; exact (hf H hH).1.disjoint he hg hne
      · apply Disjoint.mono (hH.subset_vertexSet_of_edge_mem ((hf H hH).1.subset he))
          (hK.subset_vertexSet_of_edge_mem ((hf K hK).1.subset hg))
        exact hH.disjoint_vertexSet_of_ne hK hHK
  · obtain ⟨x, hx, hunique⟩ := (hf H hH).2
    refine ⟨x, ⟨hx, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
    · simp only [V_iUnion, Set.mem_iUnion, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, not_exists, not_and]; intro K hK y hy
      by_cases hHK : H = K
      · subst hHK; exact (hf H hH).2.2 y hy
      · have := (hf K hK).1.subset hy
        exact hH.disjoint_vertexSet_of_ne K hHK ⟨x, hx, K.subset_vertexSet_of_edge_mem this⟩
    · intro y ⟨hyH, hynM⟩; apply hunique y ⟨hyH, ?_⟩
      intro hyM; apply hynM; simp only [V_iUnion, Set.mem_iUnion, Subtype.exists, exists_prop]
      use H, hH
